name: Southwest Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin by chopping the tomatillos into pieces.
2. Remove the seeds from one medium tomato and chop it finely.
3. Dice a small green bell pepper.
4. Dice another small yellow bell pepper.
5. Toast the pine nuts until lightly golden, being careful not to burn them.
6. Finely chop two cloves of garlic.
7. Snip a few fresh sage leaves into small pieces.
8. Add lemon juice and salt to taste.
